meaning: n.排水,排泄,排水装置,排水区域,排出物,消耗
examples: The area has good natural drainage.
The bricks were bedded in sand to improve drainage.
Hundreds of miles of drainage canals were built in the wetlands.
It has now put a break in the dam to control drainage around the site.
He was headed for the drainage ditch on the other side of the dike.
